name: Soul Question
tagline: Ask the questions you can't ask yourself
description: You can't see your own blind spots. Soul Question reads your conversations, meeting notes, journals, or any text, and finds the cracks in your thinking — contradictions, untested assumptions, value-behavior gaps, frame locks. Then it turns those cracks into 1-3 questions that might change how you think. Not a coach. Not a summarizer. Just the questions you didn't know you needed to face.
